title: All features should be displayed on the Hosting screen

posts.author: dvdsmpsn (David @ David Simpson Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the Hosting screen only shows views and account settings:

Screenshot 2024-10-31 at 09.24.04856×962 58.9 KB

If you set an incorrect base url for integrations (e.g. not monday-code), then it will not be displayed when you glance down the hosting screen.

This seems inconsistent and has caught me out more than once.
